  "findings": [
    "Anchor point is inadequate and its 5,000-lb capacity rating is based on guesswork rather than engineering or manufacturer certification."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt all work requiring fall protection.",
    "Remove the non-compliant anchor point from service.",
    "Install a certified anchor point rated for at least 5,000 lbs per employee attached, or have a qualified person design and supervise the installation of a system with a safety factor of at least two."
  ],
  "rationale": "Using an unverified, guessed anchor point for fall protection poses an immediate, critical risk of catastrophic failure during a fall event. OSHA standards strictly require anchorages to support at least 5,000 pounds per employee attached, or be designed, installed, and used under the supervision of a qualified person as part of a complete personal fall arrest system maintaining a safety factor of at least two.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.502(d)(15)",
    "OSHA 1910.140(c)(13)"
  ]
}
